# External Documentation

Supporting documentation for LockIn Protocol. LockIn is **open source** with **no cryptocurrency** and **no monetization**. Use this index for product, operations, and quality context.

| Document | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| [PRD-LockIn-Protocol.md](PRD-LockIn-Protocol.md) | Product requirements: scope, deliverables, functional requirements, non-functional requirements, tech stack, acceptance criteria (app-only, no crypto). |
| [lockin-business-model.md](lockin-business-model.md) | States that LockIn is open source with no business model or monetization. |
| [Customer_success_support_strategy.md](Customer_success_support_strategy.md) | Onboarding, training, ticketing (P1–P4), NPS/CSAT, user health scoring, proactive communication, feedback (no wallet/stake/billing). |
| [DevOps_strategy.md](DevOps_strategy.md) | CI/CD (frontend, backend), monitoring and alerting, infrastructure, incident response, disaster recovery, performance. |
| [Programming_Service_Contract.md](Programming_Service_Contract.md) | Service agreement template for custom development. Placeholders: Client, Provider, date, jurisdiction, payment terms. |
| [audit-standards.md](audit-standards.md) | Audit practices and pre-audit checklist summary for code and documentation. Full rule and checklist: [.cursor/rules/audit.md](../.cursor/rules/audit.md). |
